firebase.comment: Reused from CUP Dashboard. Trip data lives under the yap-trip/ namespace, no collision with CUP's data. MiniMax key reads from config/minimax_key (root).

minimax.comment: Anthropic-compatible MiniMax endpoint (same one CUP / CS2 use). Key reads from Firebase /config/minimax_key first, falls back to apiKey here. Requests use Anthropic Messages API shape.
